ground_truth_steps.description: Generate the referral document using the registered information

response_steps.description: Navigate to the referral document generation screen in the HIS.
Select the patient's record and confirm the registration details.

step_mappings.explanation: The ground truth step 1 (generating the document) is a high-level action that encompasses the more detailed response steps 1 and 2 (navigating to the screen and selecting/confirming patient details).

ground_truth_steps.description: Review the document for accuracy and completeness

step_mappings.explanation: The ground truth includes a review step that is not explicitly mentioned in the response steps. The response steps focus on generation and printing without a separate review action.

response_steps.description: Click the print button to send the document to the printer.
Retrieve the printed referral document from the printer and hand it to the patient.

step_mappings.explanation: The ground truth step 3 (printing) is a high-level action that is broken down into two more detailed response steps: clicking the print button (step 3) and retrieving/handing over the document (step 4).

unmatched_ground_truth_steps.description: Review the document for accuracy and completeness
unmatched_ground_truth_steps.reason: No corresponding step in the response explicitly describes a review or verification of the document before printing.
